title: Chrome Extension Landing Page
description: A browser-native developer tool aesthetic characterized by a 'system interface' look rather than a marketing landing page. This style features a light-neutral base with a vibrant cyan (#06B6D4) accent, mimicking the layout of Chrome DevTools or a workspace IDE. It uses a combination of Inter for primary readability and JetBrains Mono for technical labels and commands. Suitable for SaaS, developer tools, extensions, and technical platforms requiring a high-density, utility-focused layout with scroll-triggered panel reveals and simulated interactive environments.
